summary: Rideshare/taxi app with customer and driver dashboards, trip booking, admin panel, and driver profiles. Restoring trip history UI for both customer and driver dashboards.
architectural_notes: Trip history UI reconnects to existing trip storage only — no backend schema changes allowed
Customer My Trips filters where trip.customerPrincipal == caller; Driver My Trips filters where trip.driverPrincipal == caller
Available Trips (driver) shows only trips with no driver assigned

existing_features.title: Restore the 'My Trips' section in the Customer Dashboard. Display a list of trips where trip.customerPrincipal == caller, showing status (pending/assigned/confirmed/completed/cancelled), pickup/dropoff locations, vehicle type, fare, and timestamps. After a new booking is submitted, the trip must appear in the list immediately without a hard refresh.

Restore the 'My Trips' tab in the Driver Dashboard alongside the existing 'Available Trips' tab. 'My Trips' shows trips where trip.driverPrincipal == caller. 'Available Trips' shows only trips with no driver assigned. Remove the 'coming soon' placeholder text.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore Customer Dashboard 'My Trips' section showing trips by caller with live updates after booking
Restore Driver Dashboard 'My Trips' tab and fix 'Available Trips' to show only unassigned trips, remove coming soon placeholder
